age shows screenshots of SenseToLeds. SenseToLeds is an example Viptos model that contains a model of a light source, as well as a node running the TinyOS 1.x SenseToLeds program, which displays the sensed light level in binary on the LEDs of the no

sensed light level in binary on the LEDs of the node. Also see: SendAndReceiveCnt - A sender and receiver example. Surge - A multihop routing example. Top level view of SenseToLeds: Model of light source: Plot of output of light source: Hardware leve
